evals.prompt: Invoke end-opus to begin the session and load context from the latest handover.
evals.expected_output: Session context loaded, recent handover read, task list presented.

evals.prompt: Run end-opus when there is no handover file available.
evals.expected_output: Notifies user no handover found and waits for instructions.

evals.prompt: Run end-opus after completing a multi-task implementation session.
evals.expected_output: Writes handover with completed tasks, commits, and next steps.
expectations: Documents completed work with commit hashes
